summary: Verified ChunkErrorBoundary implementation for graceful chunk load failure handling. All routes and tabs load correctly with ErrorBoundary wrapper. No regressions detected.
critical_code_review_comments: ChunkErrorBoundary.jsx correctly exports class component at /app/frontend/src/components/ChunkErrorBoundary.jsx
Component has proper data-testid attributes: chunk-error-boundary-page, chunk-error-boundary-tab, chunk-error-retry-btn
App.js wraps <Suspense> with <ChunkErrorBoundary variant='page'> at lines 3840-3993
CVEManagementDashboard.jsx wraps <Suspense> with <ChunkErrorBoundary variant='tab'> at lines 154-172
isChunkLoadError() helper properly detects: ChunkLoadError, 'Loading chunk', 'Loading CSS chunk', 'dynamically imported module' errors
Retry button correctly calls window.location.reload() for chunk errors vs setState reset for other errors
context_for_next_testing_agent: ChunkErrorBoundary implementation verified. During normal operation, error boundary UI remains hidden (as expected). The component only renders error UI when React.lazy() chunk loading fails. All 5+ tabs in CVE dashboard and 14+ routes tested without issues.

regression_tests.rapid_tab_switching: PASS - No crashes during 5-tab rapid switching

error_boundary_visibility_test.note: Error boundary UI correctly hidden during normal operation
